purpose: self-evolve creator workflows through Darwin-style mutation, evaluation, selection, and retention
anti_goal: do not stop at dashboards, static boards, or vanity scorecards
cycle: retain repeated winners as examples, scripts, packages, or skills
run regression gates across existing workflows

fitness.creator_utility: helps a creator make, verify, or remix a real artifact
fitness.memory_retention: preserves intent, grammar, seed, proof path, and remix constraints
fitness.artifact_proof: produces an artifact or runnable workflow, not just commentary
fitness.boundary_safety: blocks private media, local paths, secrets, account screenshots, and raw client text
fitness.minimal_core: keeps frontier tools as adapters unless repeated wins justify promotion

selection_rule: keep the smallest mutation that improves creator utility without weakening proof or public boundary
retention_ladder: regression failures -> revert or quarantine the mutation
